states.name: Dark Alice
states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description:
One day, a mysterious hole opened in the fabric of the world of dreams. As holes in worlds go, this one was quite small, inconspicuous—just a lonely, dark hole.
Inside it there was a hidden room, and in that room there was a girl—another Alice, caught up in the darkest of nightmares.

states.name: Dark Alice
states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description: She paints white roses red, without anyone's knowledge or permission—she just wants to make her favorite garden pretty. So that it is ready when someone comes to visit. So that she can be the best host there ever was. But such a day never comes, and Alice's heart breaks into dark, lonely pieces—or maybe it has already been broken long ago.

states.name: Dark Alice
states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description:
After a long day of playing with spectres of countless nightmares, Alice falls asleep in her rose garden, just like always.
"What a pitiful sight you are," a voice says, as a single silhouette appears by her side. With a wicked smile, the Queen of Nightmares—the one that Alice once sealed away, the one that has destroyed Alice in return—watches the girl's peaceful, sleeping face.
